name: Installed Building Products, Inc.
summary: PART I OUR COMPANY Installed Building Products, Inc. (IBP) and its wholly-owned subsidiaries (collectively referred to as the Company and we, us and our) primarily install insulation for residential and commercial builders located in the continental United States. We are also a diversified installer of complementary building products including waterproofing, fire-stopping, fireproofing, garage doors, rain gutters, window blinds, shower doors, closet shelving and mirrors and other products.
